successMessage: Your request has been successfully submitted. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
reviewStepText: Our team will review your booking request and get back to you as soon as possible.
paymentStepText: You will receive all payment information (IBAN, reference) directly to your email address.
confirmStepText: Once your payment is received, the booking will be confirmed and your accommodation reserved.

placeholders.specialRequests: Do you have any special requests?

info.freeCancellation: Free cancellation up to {hours}h before check-in
info.freeCancellationLong: Free cancellation up to {hours} hours before check-in

payment.bankTransferDesc: IBAN transfer – payment details will be sent via email
payment.bankTransferInfo: Booking will be confirmed after payment is received. Valid for all European banks.
payment.creditCardInfo: Secure payment with SSL encryption. Your card details are never stored.
payment.paypalDesc: Pay quickly and securely with your PayPal account
payment.paypalInfo: With PayPal buyer protection. You will be redirected to PayPal.
payment.firstBookingWarning: For your first booking, only bank transfer is available as a payment method. After a successful booking, additional payment methods will be unlocked.
payment.lockedMethod: Available after your first successful booking
